title: Unwaxed Lemon Affair
description: A bitter and dense dish featuring an unwaxed lemon as its star ingredient, with a touch of romantic Saudi Arabian flair suitable for low-sodium diets.

ingredients.name: unwaxed lemon
ingredients.notes: Choose a lemon with a subtle bitterness and dense consistency.

ingredients.name: fresh mint leaves
ingredients.notes: For garnish only, add to taste

instructions: Slice the lemon thinly and place in a bowl. Add fresh mint leaves.
Squeeze 2 tablespoons of lime juice over the sliced lemon, ensuring it evenly coats all surfaces.
Taste test to adjust the amount of lime juice for your desired level of bitterness and acidity.
